# CWE-268 — Privilege Chaining (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-268-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

// Safe: export requires explicit admin role, not a combination of weak scopes.
func ExportUsers(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	if c.GetString("role") != "admin" {
		c.JSON(403, gin.H{"error": "forbidden"})
		return
	}
	rows, err := db.Queryx("SELECT email FROM users")
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "db"})
		return
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"status": "queued"})
}
